title: URAQT Reusable Mop Refill Pads for Flash Power mop, 6 PCS Mop Pads Microfibre Wet Dry Cleaning Mop Pad Machine Washable Up, for Wet Dry Floor Cleaning Tiles Hardwood Laminate Floor
features: ⚫【Reusable】This replacement mop pad is easy to clean and can be reused many times without damage. Just throw it in the washing machine after mopping and they will be as good as new. Reduce waste and be more environmentally friendly. In addition, these microfiber mop head replacements can adapt to various cleaning agents without damage.

⚫【Easy to Clean and Install】This mop pad is thickened and very durable, which can easily clean floor stains, and is equipped with hook and loop buckles for convenient drying. It can be easily installed on the mop for cleaning, easy to stick on the mop, and easy to tear off for cleaning.

⚫【High-quality materials】This mop cloth is designed with microfiber material to enhance the friction between the mop replacement head and the floor, which can easily remove dirt, debris and pet hair whether it is wet or dry cleaning. Remove sticky stains, but still gentle enough not to scratch sealed floors.

⚫【Best Choice】This microfiber mop pad is 12*5.5 inches in size, perfectly compatible with Flash Speed ​​Mop, and suitable for other 11-inch-13-inch mop designs, and the package contains 6 Power mop pad replacements for replacement and cleaning of different areas.

⚫【Wide Application】Used for most floors, the mop pad is suitable for hardwood floor cleaning, laminate flooring, tile flooring, glass, bamboo, laminate, ceramic, marble, etc. It can also be used to clean windows, walls and ceilings.
